title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Taj Hotels Retail

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Taj Hotels Retail
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
